ddls:
CREATE TABLE "robotic_arms" (
  "arm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each robotic arm */,
  "arm_model" TEXT /* Model of the robotic arm */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the robotic arm was installed */,
  "production_line_id" INTEGER /* ID of the production line where the robotic arm is installed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the robotic arm (e.g., operational, maintenance) */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Unique serial number of the robotic arm */,
  "firmware_version" TEXT /* Current firmware version of the robotic arm */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date when the robotic arm was last calibrated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("arm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_robotic_arms_production_line_id FOREIGN KEY ("production_line_id") REFERENCES production_lines ("production_line_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "production_lines" (
  "production_line_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each production line */,
  "line_name" TEXT /* Name of the production line */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the production line */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manager responsible for the production line */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity of the production line (e.g., number of units per hour) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("production_line_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_production_lines_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES managers ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "managers" (
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manager */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Full name of the manager */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the manager */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the manager */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the manager belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movement_data" (
  "movement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movement record */,
  "arm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the robotic arm */,
  "time_stamp" TEXT /* Time stamp of the movement record (in milliseconds) */,
  "step_base" INTEGER /* Step movement of the base joint */,
  "step_elbow" INTEGER /* Step movement of the elbow joint */,
  "step_shoulder" INTEGER /* Step movement of the shoulder joint */,
  "step_wrist_left" INTEGER /* Step movement of the wrist left joint */,
  "step_wrist_right" INTEGER /* Step movement of the wrist right joint */,
  "step_gripper" INTEGER /* Step movement of the gripper joint */,
  "palm_x" REAL /* x-coordinate of the palm (end effector) */,
  "palm_y" REAL /* y-coordinate of the palm (end effector) */,
  "palm_z" REAL /* z-coordinate of the palm (end effector) */,
  "torque_base" REAL /* Torque applied to the base joint */,
  "torque_elbow" REAL /* Torque applied to the elbow joint */,
  "torque_shoulder" REAL /* Torque applied to the shoulder joint */,
  "torque_wrist_left" REAL /* Torque applied to the wrist left joint */,
  "torque_wrist_right" REAL /* Torque applied to the wrist right joint */,
  "torque_gripper" REAL /* Torque applied to the gripper joint */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movement_data_arm_id FOREIGN KEY ("arm_id") REFERENCES robotic_arms ("arm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_history" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "arm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the robotic arm */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the maintenance activity */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance (e.g., routine check, repair) */,
  "details" TEXT /* Details of the maintenance activity */,
  "technician_id" INTEGER /* ID of the technician who performed the maintenance */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the maintenance activity in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_history_technician_id FOREIGN KEY ("technician_id") REFERENCES technicians ("technician_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_history_arm_id FOREIGN KEY ("arm_id") REFERENCES robotic_arms ("arm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "technicians" (
  "technician_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each technician */,
  "technician_name" TEXT /* Full name of the technician */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the technician */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the technician */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Area of specialization (e.g., mechanical, electrical) */,
  "certification" TEXT /* Certification level (e.g., basic, advanced) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("technician_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "anomalies" (
  "anomaly_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each anomaly */,
  "arm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the robotic arm */,
  "time_stamp" TEXT /* Time stamp of the anomaly (in milliseconds) */,
  "anomaly_type" TEXT /* Type of anomaly (e.g., unexpected movement, collision) */,
  "details" TEXT /* Details of the anomaly */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the anomaly (e.g., open, resolved) */,
  "resolved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who resolved the anomaly */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date when the anomaly was resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("anomaly_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_anomalies_arm_id FOREIGN KEY ("arm_id") REFERENCES robotic_arms ("arm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_anomalies_resolved_by FOREIGN KEY ("resolved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed for security) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "data_accessed" TEXT /* Description of the data accessed (e.g., movement data, maintenance history) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric record */,
  "arm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the robotic arm */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date of the performance metrics */,
  "efficiency" REAL /* Efficiency of the robotic arm (as a percentage) */,
  "downtime" INTEGER /* Total downtime in minutes */,
  "maintenance_count" INTEGER /* Number of maintenance activities performed */,
  "anomaly_count" INTEGER /* Number of anomalies detected */,
  "average_cycle_time" REAL /* Average cycle time in seconds */,
  "average_throughput" REAL /* Average throughput in units per hour */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_arm_id FOREIGN KEY ("arm_id") REFERENCES robotic_arms ("arm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permission_level" INTEGER /* Permission level (e.g., 1, 2, 3) for the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)
